privileged_info_summary: The task dynamically generates three synthetic VeraCrypt volumes (alpha_entry.hc, beta_relay.hc, and gamma_vault.hc) sequentially holding keys for one another. The target output path is explicitly verified as /home/ga/Documents/recovered_coordinates.csv. A critical defect was discovered: the actual MD5 hash of the synthetically injected coordinates.csv data is cf50e70100ef36b526991b49da8b022e, which directly contradicts the task's expected metadata claim and verifier logic of e5b85368670878146958428286594247. This defect permanently fails any correct agent implementation.
